'''parongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oshamnu|oshamnu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oshamnu|oshamnu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| parongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pærengeth|pærengeth]] || [[word:pærengej|pærengej]] || [[word:pærengesh|pærengesh]] || [[word:pærenge|pærenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:parorongoth|parorongoth]] || [[word:parorongoj|parorongoj]] || [[word:parorongosh|parorongosh]] || [[word:parorongo|parorongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:parongoth|parongoth]] || [[word:parongoj|parongoj]] || [[word:parongosh|parongosh]] || [[word:parongo|parongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:parofngoth|parofngoth]] || [[word:parofngoj|parofngoj]] || [[word:parofngosh|parofngosh]] || [[word:parofngof|parofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:parongotho|parongotho]] || [[word:parongojo|parongojo]] || [[word:parongosho|parongosho]] || [[word:parongoko|parongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:parongoth|parongoth]] || [[word:parongoj|parongoj]] || [[word:parongosh|parongosh]] || [[word:parongo|parongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:parongothol|parongothol]] || [[word:parongojol|parongojol]] || [[word:parongoshol|parongoshol]] || [[word:parongokol|parongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:parongothotho|parongothotho]] || [[word:parongojojo|parongojojo]] || [[word:parongoshosho|parongoshosho]] || [[word:parongoko|parongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:parongothon|parongothon]] || [[word:parongojon|parongojon]] || [[word:parongoshon|parongoshon]] || [[word:parongokon|parongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:parongothoro|parongothoro]] || [[word:parongojoro|parongojoro]] || [[word:parongoshoro|parongoshoro]] || [[word:parongokoro|parongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
